nasb.text: Where are Your former lovingkindnesses, O Lord, Which You swore to David in Your faithfulness?

esv.text: Lord, where is your steadfast love of old, which by your faithfulness you swore to David?

cnv.text: 主啊！你從前指著你的信實向大衛起誓要施的慈愛， 現今在哪裡呢？

ccb.text: 主啊，你从前凭自己的信实向大卫应许的慈爱在哪里呢？

csbs.text: 主啊，你先前指着你的信实向大卫起誓要施行的慈爱， 如今在哪里呢？
